ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the track was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the track */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the track contains explicit content */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the track has been played */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date and time the track was last played */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the track is featured */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the track has been deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent genre to support hierarchical genre structures */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the album */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the album contains explicit content */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the album has been played */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date and time the album was last played */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the album has been deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_info" (
  "time_info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time info entry */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track the time info belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the track was released */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the track was released */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the track was released */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the track was released */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the track was released */,
  "second" INTEGER /* Second the track was released */,
  "has_time_info" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the track has time info */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the track was played at the specified time */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date and time the track was last played at the specified time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_info_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the track */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the track was updated */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the track */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the version is the current version */,
  "revert_date" TEXT /* Date the track was reverted to this version (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_versions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used in the password hashing */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the playlist is public */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the playlist has been played */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date and time the playlist was last played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist track entry */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist the track belongs to */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track in the playlist */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the track in the playlist has been played */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date and time the track in the playlist was last played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like entry */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track the like belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who liked the track */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the track was liked */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the like has been deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_likes_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment entry */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who commented on the track */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment has been deleted (soft delete) */,
  "is_spam" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment is marked as spam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_comments_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_tracks" (
  "album_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album track entry */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track in the album */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number in the album */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the track in the album contains explicit content */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the track in the album has been played */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date and time the track in the album was last played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_albums" (
  "artist_album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist album entry */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist the album belongs to */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album by the artist */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the album by the artist has been played */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date and time the album by the artist was last played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_albums_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
